creator: spcoltri@code.cs.unm.edu
text:
I think I've found the problem:

If gnomeprint is installed, gnucash-1.3.4/configure detects it and adds
-lgnomeprint to $LIBS, but does _not_ add the supporting -Ls and -ls needed
to link against gnomeprint.  gnucash-1.3.4/lib/g-wrap/configure then uses
this value of $LIBS when linking test programs, which causes the links to
fail.

A (perhaps not the best) fix is to add to the patches directory:

--- configure.orig^IWed Jun 21 02:43:13 2000
+++ configure^IWed Jun 21 02:43:28 2000
@@ -4170,7 +4170,7 @@
 #define $ac_tr_lib 1
 EOF
 
-  LIBS="-lgnomeprint $LIBS"
+  LIBS="-lgnomeprint $EXTRALIBS $LIBS"
 
 else
   echo "$ac_t""no" 1>&6

(^I represents a tab char).

Hope this is useful,

-spc
